_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of hair shaft progenitors that create a niche for hair pigmentation.

_contextSnippet: Quantification and statistical analysis...showing a significant reduction of melanin density in Scf flox/gfp; Krox20Cre graying hair shafts. Melanin density was analyzed by ImageJ. Data are mean ± SEM from 100 randomly selected HFs
details: Successfully quantified melanin density showing significant reduction (P < 0.0001) in Scf graying hair shafts from 100 randomly selected HFs
